The '''"ugly" assassin droid''' was a type of [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] created prior to or during<ref name="Rogue Planet" /> [[29 BBY/Legends|29 BBY]].<ref name="TERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> The model utilized a rudimentary thorax and had a long, cylindrical head. However, the model failed for two reasons; the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were both obvious in appearance and prone to lose control and [[Death/Legends|kill]] their makers. One [[Unidentified student (Rigovian Technical University)|individual]] who was involved in the droids' design was killed by [[Unidentified assassin droid|one]] of these droids due to the model's flaws. The droid that killed her later had its [[Verbobrain/Legends|verbobrain]] destroyed by [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]], and [[Raith Sienar/Legends|Raith Sienar]], a prominent [[Engineer/Legends|engineer]] in the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] who had attended the [[Rigovian Technical University]] alongside the student, had the droid placed in his [[Raith Sienar's museum|personal]] [[Museum/Legends|museum]] as a reminder to not overstep one's competence.<ref name="Rogue Planet" />

==Behind the scenes==
This droid model appeared in [[Greg Bear]]'s ''[[Rogue Planet]]'', a novel released in [[2000]].<ref name="Rogue Planet" />
